title: Corporate Finance Analyst
overview: Support strategic financial planning, budgeting, and performance analysis for airline operations.
rolePurpose: Provide financial analysis that improves capital allocation, profitability, and risk decisions.
responsibilities: Build and maintain financial models for route and fleet planning.
Prepare monthly performance dashboards and variance analysis.
Support annual budgeting and rolling forecast cycles.
Evaluate investment opportunities and business cases.
Partner with operations and procurement on cost optimization.
knowHow: Strong financial modeling and valuation fundamentals.
problemSolvingAndAccountability: Translate business data into recommendations for management.
Escalate significant financial risks promptly.
Improve reporting quality and planning accuracy.
qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, or Actuarial Science.
1-2 years in corporate finance, FP&A, or advisory.
CPA, ACCA, or CFA progress is an added advantage.

application.instructions: Submit CV and a one-page cover note highlighting relevant finance projects.

title: Communications Assistant
overview: Coordinate internal and external communication materials across web, social, and events.
rolePurpose: Improve brand consistency and communication turnaround time across teams.
responsibilities: Draft announcements, social media copy, and newsletter content.
Support planning and execution of media and partner events.
Maintain communication calendars and campaign trackers.
Coordinate visual assets with design and product teams.
knowHow: Clear written communication and editing skills.
Basic campaign planning and reporting knowledge.
Familiarity with Canva or similar tools.
problemSolvingAndAccountability: Handle urgent communication requests with quality and speed.
Ensure all published content aligns with brand guidelines.
qualifications: Degree or diploma in Communication, PR, Journalism, or related field.
Portfolio of writing samples is preferred.

application.instructions: Attach CV plus two communication samples.

title: Operations Attachment
overview: Gain practical exposure to workflow monitoring, support logistics, and process documentation.
rolePurpose: Strengthen day-to-day service delivery by supporting operational workflows.
responsibilities: Assist with daily task coordination across operations teams.
Update process documentation and SLA trackers.
Support inventory, dispatch, and vendor follow-up.
problemSolvingAndAccountability: Escalate bottlenecks early and suggest practical fixes.
Keep operational records accurate and current.
qualifications: Current student or recent graduate in Business, Logistics, or related area.
Availability for a 3-6 month attachment.

application.instructions: Share CV and current academic transcript.

title: Finance Attachment
overview: Support reconciliations, reporting packs, and budget tracking in a fast-paced team.
rolePurpose: Improve reporting timeliness and finance process discipline.
responsibilities: Assist with ledger reviews and account reconciliations.
Compile monthly expense summaries.
Support audit preparation and file organization.
knowHow: Basic accounting principles and spreadsheet proficiency.
Attention to detail and data integrity mindset.
problemSolvingAndAccountability: Identify reconciliation differences and support root-cause analysis.
Maintain accurate finance records and audit trails.
qualifications: Studying or completed degree in Accounting, Finance, or Economics.
CPA/ACCA foundation level is an advantage.

application.instructions: Submit CV plus brief statement of interest in finance.

title: Software Engineering Intern
overview: Work with engineers to ship backend and frontend features with strong code quality practices.
rolePurpose: Contribute production-ready code while building software engineering fundamentals.
responsibilities: Build and test product features under engineer mentorship.
Fix defects and improve reliability in existing modules.
Write unit tests and participate in code reviews.
problemSolvingAndAccountability: Break down tasks and communicate delivery risks early.
Own assigned tickets from implementation to validation.
qualifications: Pursuing degree in Computer Science or related field.
Portfolio or GitHub projects showing practical coding experience.

application.instructions: Attach CV and link to GitHub profile.

title: DevOps Intern
overview: Support CI/CD pipelines, environment monitoring, and cloud infrastructure operations.
rolePurpose: Improve deployment speed and platform reliability with automation-first practices.
responsibilities: Assist with CI pipeline maintenance and troubleshooting.
Monitor cloud resources and create basic dashboards.
Support incident documentation and postmortem follow-ups.
problemSolvingAndAccountability: Investigate deployment issues and suggest remediations.
Document recurring operational runbooks.
qualifications: Exposure to AWS, GCP, or Azure is preferred.
Understanding of version control and CI tools.

application.instructions: Submit CV and short note about a deployment project you worked on.

title: Data Analyst Intern
overview: Analyze operational and customer data to support reporting and decision making.
rolePurpose: Deliver reliable insights through clean datasets and clear dashboards.
responsibilities: Clean and validate data from multiple business systems.
Build recurring reports and dashboard views.
Support ad hoc analysis for cross-functional teams.
problemSolvingAndAccountability: Detect inconsistencies and improve data quality rules.
Communicate findings clearly to non-technical stakeholders.
qualifications: Pursuing degree in Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, or related field.
Experience with Power BI, Tableau, or Looker is a plus.

application.instructions: Share CV and one sample dashboard or analysis project.

title: Graduate Software Trainee
overview: Structured graduate program focused on modern web engineering and delivery practices.
rolePurpose: Transition graduates into effective product engineers through hands-on delivery.
responsibilities: Complete learning sprints and practical coding assignments.
Contribute to real product modules with mentor reviews.
Present demos and technical write-ups during the program.
knowHow: Comfortable with at least one programming language.
Basic understanding of APIs and data structures.
problemSolvingAndAccountability: Demonstrate consistent progress across learning milestones.
Implement feedback quickly and improve code quality.
qualifications: Recent graduate in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
Strong problem-solving and collaboration skills.

application.instructions: Upload CV and complete the online coding assessment.

title: Graduate Product Trainee
overview: Learn product discovery, prioritization, and delivery in a structured trainee track.
rolePurpose: Support product squads with research, planning, and launch coordination.
responsibilities: Collect user insights and synthesize key product themes.
Support backlog grooming and roadmap documentation.
Coordinate release notes and stakeholder updates.
knowHow: Basic understanding of agile product workflows.
problemSolvingAndAccountability: Turn ambiguous requests into clear product tasks.
Track commitments and follow through on delivery checkpoints.
qualifications: Recent graduate in Business, Engineering, or related field.
Interest in product strategy and user experience.

application.instructions: Submit CV and answer the product case prompt in the form.

title: Graduate Business Analyst
overview: Translate business needs into clear requirements and actionable improvement plans.
rolePurpose: Support process optimization and data-informed decision making across business units.
responsibilities: Gather requirements through interviews and workshops.
Map current and target business processes.
Support KPI definition and reporting design.
knowHow: Strong analytical reasoning and documentation skills.
Basic process mapping and reporting tools.
problemSolvingAndAccountability: Validate requirements with stakeholders before implementation.
Track analysis outputs and business impact metrics.
qualifications: Recent graduate in Business, Economics, IT, or related field.
Knowledge of Excel and presentation tools.

application.instructions: Attach CV and one-page statement on your interest in business analysis.
